case_title: VANGUARD FINANCIAL SERVICE CORP., AN ILLINOIS CORP vs. GALAXY REALTY AND FINANCE CORP

docket_entries.description: PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY BE ISSUED ON 4/3/01, IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT.
